hero.title: Stillwater Trail and Road Runners
hero.tagline: All paces, all levels, all welcome.

weeklyIntro: Three runs, every week, every pace. Show up, say hi, and someone will make sure you're never out there alone.

schedule.description: All paces welcome — hikers, walkers, and runners with 1 mile, 3.5 mile, 7 mile, or out-and-back options. Meet at the East Pavilion. Lake McMurtry charges a $6 day pass if you don't have an annual pass. In the darker months, bring a headlamp.
A social road run from Stonecloud Brewing through downtown Stillwater. Routes are short and flexible, and the real point is the patio afterward. Walkers welcome.
The Saturday morning staple. Meet at Aspen Coffee downtown for anything from an easy few miles to a long run, then stick around for coffee with the crew.
